No chemical spills needed to be cleaned in 2006.
The lead parts in our process only need to be changed every 1-2 years, so we did not recycle as many parts as last year.

The zinc that enters the plant already applied to the steel (Hot Dipped Galvanized) also leaves the plant in the same state, thus it should be considered an Article Substance. Only zinc applied at this plant is accounted for.
Changes in product mix. Is a component in some paints only.
